# Review CHANGES REQUESTED for PAN-1491

## Verdict: CHANGES REQUESTED

- Prior cycle SHA: 383e8cf7b2861a1d217d960d8c7eba55a92ac483

## Convoy Status
| Sub-role | Signal | Output | Blocking findings |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

## Blocking Findings

### [performance] Reviewer failed before writing a report
The performance convoy reviewer terminal signal was `REVIEWER_FAILED performance reviewer session ended before writing a report`. Per the review role rules, any failed reviewer blocks approval even if the other reports are readable.

### [correctness] Substrate bug weights fetch issue details from the current repo, not the bug's repo — `src/dashboard/server/services/flywheel-bug-weights.ts:43`
The new weight service strips the `PREFIX-` portion from a substrate bug id and runs `gh issue view <number> --json body,labels` from the dashboard process cwd, without passing `--repo`. Substrate bugs are recorded with per-project prefixes such as `KRUX-3`, so this fetches `eltmon/panopticon-cli#3` when the dashboard is running from this repo instead of `eltmon/krux#3`, or fails when the number does not exist in the current repo. Runtime impact: `/api/flywheel/substrate-bug-weights` and `pan flywheel weights` can compute weights from the wrong issue body/labels or lose the whole payload for cross-repo substrate bugs. The cited file was added since prior cycle SHA `383e8cf7b2861a1d217d960d8c7eba55a92ac483`, so the cycle-10 convergence gate does not demote it.

## Non-blocking Findings

### [security] ~ Unauthenticated GET can drive GitHub CLI lookups — `src/dashboard/server/routes/flywheel.ts:568`
The new `/api/flywheel/substrate-bug-weights` route is reachable as a GET route and can invoke GitHub CLI lookups for every open substrate bug, bounded only by service concurrency. The security reviewer classified this as a hardening advisory rather than a blocking vulnerability: it does not expose tokens or issue bodies directly, but it can burn the operator's GitHub API quota and create avoidable local/remote load. Suggested follow-up: require dashboard auth or the internal token on this route before invoking weight computation, and consider short-lived caching or rate limiting keyed by window.

## Clean Sub-roles
- requirements: all 38 in-PR-scope acceptance criteria were reported implemented, with no findings.

Source: /home/eltmon/Projects/panopticon-cli/workspaces/feature-pan-1491/.pan/review/agent-pan-1491-review-1c09ba9e/synthesis.md

## Required action

Fix every blocking review finding, commit the fixes, then re-request review with:

`pan review request PAN-1491 -m "Fixed review issues"`
